confirmed.name: Common Ground Kauaʻi / CG Foundation
confirmed.notes: CG Foundation page states contributors can make a donation to the Foundation's work and links to PayPal support.

confirmed.name: Hāna Arts
confirmed.notes: Site has Donate navigation and donation/membership levels with tax-deductible language.

confirmed.name: Hoʻi Hoʻi Ea
confirmed.notes: Site has Donate navigation and one-time, weekly, and monthly donation options.

confirmed.name: Honpa Hongwanji Mission of Hawaii / Hawaiʻi Betsuin
confirmed.notes: Site has donate page with statewide programs, temple donations, and PayPal donation links.

confirmed.name: KAʻEHU
confirmed.notes: Dedicated donate/support page for land restoration and cultural work.

confirmed.name: Men of PAʻA
confirmed.notes: Site navigation includes Donate to Men of Paa linked to PayPal; Imu Mea ʻAi site says it is the social enterprise owned by Men of PAʻA.

confirmed.name: Molokaʻi Land Trust
confirmed.notes: Dedicated donate page for Mokio Preserve restoration and related volunteer/stewardship programs.

manual_review.name: Aloha with Touch Kauaʻi
manual_review.notes: Site says monetary exchange for cultural experiences is provided through generous donations to practitioners and organizations and welcomes additional contributions, but evidence did not show a clean standalone donation checkout.
